raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally dispute an incorrect charge on my account regarding a duplicate balance transfer that occurred between XXXX XXXX  and Barclays Bank in XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. Below is a timeline of the events : XX/XX/XXXX I opened a XXXX XXXX  account to complete a balance transfer of {$4100.00}. 

XX/XX/XXXX A second balance transfer of {$3800.00} was posted, overpaying my Barclays account by {$4100.00}. 

I immediately contacted both banks, but was informed that the transfer could not be canceled as it had already posted. 

Barclays refunded me {$4000.00} via check, which I deposited and subsequently used to pay XXXX XXXX  on XX/XX/XXXX. 

Using my tax refund, I fully paid off my XXXX XXXX  balance, reducing it to {$0.00}. 

XX/XX/XXXX Upon logging into my Barclays account, I noticed a new charge of {$4200.00}, which I do not owe. 

Barclays informed me that a check was cashed, and I needed to contact XXXX XXXX. However, XXXX XXXX  has no record of an outstanding balance or overpayment. 

At this time, I am being incorrectly charged for a balance that I have already paid. 

I request an immediate investigation and correction of this issue. Please provide me with a written response within 30 days, confirming the resolution. 

I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. You can contact me at XXXX or at XXXX XXXX
